title: Trump says U.S. will seize Iran's Kharg Island and other 'oil infrastructure points'
summary_full: Trump said the forthcoming operations to take over Iran's oil infrastructure, and its oil and gas markets, would be similar to U.S. actions in Venezuela.
summary_public: Trump said the forthcoming operations to take over Iran's oil infrastructure, and its oil and gas markets, would be similar to U.S. actions in Venezuela.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: seize Iran's Kharg Island and other 'oil infrastructure points'
